EmailTemplate.name: BugLogs - Log Assigned To User
EmailTemplate.subject: Salesforce Program - A new log has been assigned to you
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Bug_Log__c.AssignedTo__c} !
Please notice that a new log has been assigned to you !
Go on Easy Log page to check {!Bug_Log__c.Owner__c} 's request and provide a quick solution !
Follow the link : https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Bug_Log__c/{!Bug_Log__c.Id}/view
For information, it concerns {!Bug_Log__c.App__c}
